title: podman-remote exec (attach) missing output
body:
Seen in many different variations so I guess it is a general issues with the remote client not getting the full output.

https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6343849678733312/html/sys-remote-fedora-41-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html

```
# $ podman-remote exec d7fea44b7b0ee0002211e37ba844584a62952ab92027b20f6ce201aff65ad609 id -g nobody
# <--- empty output!!! Which then is stored as var and used for later test thus the confusing expected: = '' below
....
# $ podman-remote exec --user nobody d7fea44b7b0ee0002211e37ba844584a62952ab92027b20f6ce201aff65ad609 id -G
# 65534
         # #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
         # #|     FAIL: must have only nobody gid
         # #| expected: = ''
         # #|   actual:   65534
         # #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```

https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5863115297914880/html/sys-remote-fedora-41-rootless-host-sqlite.log.html
```
# $ podman-remote exec c-dest-created-t120-3xk85whf cat /dir/sub/hostfile0 /dir/sub/hostfile1
# #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
# #|     FAIL: copy dir  to root (cp -> ctr:/ - CREATED)
# #| expected: 'random-0-BZIfyXw4UD random-1-odRHheNoBMvWH6y'
# #|   actual: ''
# #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```

https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6421089162625024/html/sys-remote-fedora-41-aarch64-root-host-sqlite.log.html
```
# # podman-remote exec 8f1294ba1828a94c5d6739f633ee1aaa424b99870866a0045d218c70aece3c1e cat /subdir/containerfile0 /subdir/containerfile1
# #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
# #|     FAIL: copy /srv/. - from RUNNING to RUNNING
# #| expected: 'random-0-I5dgopq4DS random-1-LjAAtNAfbZz29qx'
# #|   actual: ''
# #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```

https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4792978629197824/html/int-remote-fedora-41-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-update-podman-update-sets-unsets-environment-variables--1
```
# podman-remote [options] start --attach test-ctr-name

           [FAILED] Expected
               <string>: 
           to contain substring
               <string>: BAR
           In [It] at: /var/tmp/go/src/github.com[/containers/podman/test/e2e/update_test.go:265](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/ca0d7d7a57d8b591e39fd09f743ed10a899a2ea8/test/e2e/update_test.go#L265) @ 04/10/25 10:17:24.234
```

The first one seems to be most clear as id missing output sounds quite unlikely, in the other test there could be some podman logic bug for cp but that seems quite unlikely to me so I assume they all have the same root cause, especially  as they are only seen with podman-remote.

This fails a lot, I have just linked a few recent ones I saw.

comments.body:
```
[FAILED] Expected
    <string>: 
to contain substring
    <string>: 500000
In [It] at: /var/tmp/go/src/github.com[/containers/podman/test/e2e/update_test.go:171](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/80993f2c3b88d8abfa595e1ce3b2465c1ef1fa10/test/e2e/update_test.go#L171) @ 04/23/25 05:13:42.739
```
https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6520414475649024/html/int-remote-fedora-42-root-host-sqlite.log.html#t--Podman-update-podman-update-keep-original-resources-if-not-overridden--1
